name: Nomads

meta.title: Nomads.com - Best Places to Live for Digital Nomads (formerly Nomad List)
meta.description: Learn how to become a digital nomad and find the best places to live and work remotely as a location independent remote worker. Explore places based on cost of living, internet speed, weather and other metrics. For startups that work remotely and remote workers.
meta.ogDescription: 🌍 Go nomad: Join a global community of remote workers living around the world
